structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Fault Detection (Safety Shutdown)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Exceptions to Lead/lag and Lead/standby rotation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A chiller is faulted if it has a safety shutdown alarm condition, is manually shut off, status remains off 5 minutes after start command, or other valve/flow conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Safety shutdown alarm condition; manual shut off; status off 5 minutes after start; valve feedback mismatch; low delta-T for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 2 alarm and respond per fault handling logic.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Safety shutdown alarm condition either through network or hardwired alarm contact.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: ii. Chillers (a) Safety shutdown alarm condition either through network or hardwired alarm contact. (b) Chiller is manually shut off as indicated by the status of the Local/Auto switch from chiller gateway, or (c) Chiller status remains off 5 minutes after command to start...

evidence_quote: ii. Chillers (a) Safety shutdown alarm condition either through network or hardwired alarm contact. (b) Chiller is manually shut off as indicated by the status of the Local/Auto switch from chiller gateway, or (c) Chiller status remains off 5 minutes after command to start...
